subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-23 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: At a time when the government ruled with tyranny, the Covenant-breakers were a hindrance, and problems both internal and external were present—it was in the midst of all this turmoil that I built the Shrine of the Bab
subcodes.first_line_orig: در زمانیکه حکومت مستبد ناقضین مانع اشکالات داخلی و خارجی حاضر در بحبوحه
subcodes.subjects: @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @the Christian clergy, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
